zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Stewart於1247年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾時，她的父親Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland33歲，母親Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness38歲。她於1265年與Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs在蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1326年5月3日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Stewart于1247年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾时，她的父亲Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland33岁，母亲Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness38岁。她于1265年与Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs在苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于1326年5月3日在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Stewart was born in 1247, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, was 33 and her mother, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, was 38. She married Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs in 1265, in Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died on 3 May 1326, in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Stewart est née en 1247, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs en 1265, à Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1326, à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Stewart 1247 in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland 33 und ihre Mutter Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness 38. Sie hat 1265 in Lanarkshire, Scotland Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1326 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Stewart è nata il nel 1247 nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs nel 1265, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì il 3 maggio 1326, nel Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Stewartが1247年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルで生まれた時，父Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotlandは33歳，母Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchionessは38歳であった。1265年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアでEdward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaursと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は1326年5月3日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Stewart(이)가 1247년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1265년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 5월 3일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Stewart nasceu em 1247, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs em 1265, em Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1326, em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Stewart родилась в 1247 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs в 1265 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла 3 мая 1326 г. в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Stewart nació en 1247, en Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Edward de Cunynghame, of Kilmaurs en 1265, en Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1326, en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 79 años.
